name: Sunstock, Inc.
summary: Sunstock, Inc. engages in the buying, selling, and distributing gold and precious metals. The company secures and/or acquires mining assets, as well as rights to purchase mining production and sells these metals primarily through retail channels, including branded coins. It owns and operates retail store, which engages in buying and selling of gold, silver, and rare coins in the greater Sacramento metropolitan area. The company was formerly known as Sandgate Acquisition Corporation and changed its name to Sunstock, Inc. in July 2013. Sunstock, Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Sacramento, California.
